title: School funding statistics: 2024 to 2025 financial year
body: "This release contains data for:   school revenue funding for 5 to 16 year olds between the 2010 to 2011 and 2025 to 2026 financial years school funding allocations for the 2024 to 2025 financial year   For queries about these statistics, email schoolfunding.statistics@education.gov.uk. "
